text:
Once upon an autumn evening, an owl hopped silently onto a branch across Miss Attolia’s owl-viewPERTIES.That evening had nothing special about it.

Just some cats playing outdoors.

One owl watched them curiously. He felt oddly peckish.

You want crumbs?

He hoot loudly.

A dozen cats stopped playing.

There ya go!

That evening.

They dug worms burrowing deep underground.

That owl liked worms.

Eat them all.

It’ll keep hunger aside.

Maybe find a burrow.



That way they could dine quietly.



They snooped everywhere.

Maybe found an abandoned nest.



Perhaps.

Now would feel weird.



He did that afternoon.

Found burrows.

Worms inside.

Probably mice.

Probably got scared.

That owl liked mice.

That night they feasted.

Miss Attolia saw them.

She swooned.

I saw owl!

You must feast!

Yeah!

There’ll be more.







That owl.

You'll think differently.



What would I think?


That eating mice feels
